error_signature: Text not inserted into rich text editor
title: Text not inserting into Rich Text Editor
symptom: When executing the JavaScript function to insert text, nothing happens in the rich text editor.
not_this_if: Text is inserted correctly after executing the function
root_cause: The function to insert text into the rich text editor must be called explicitly after defining it. If the function is not executed, the intended action will not occur.
fix_steps: Ensure the function insertTextIntoRichTextInput is defined
Call the function at the end of your JavaScript code with the desired text
agent_instruction: Call the insertTextIntoRichTextInput function at the end of your JavaScript code to insert text.
